product_overview: BooKLooP is a responsive library management and book-exchange web app that lets users sign in via passwordless OTP, view activity feeds and profiles, manage book requests, and chat with other users. The app is designed for desktop and mobile and supports installation as a Progressive Web App.
core_goals: Allow users to securely sign in using passwordless OTP and access their account
Let users browse a global activity log of book interactions and open user profiles
Enable users to request, accept, and decline book exchanges
Provide a chat interface for direct communication between users
Offer an installable PWA experience that preserves user sessions across visits

features.name: User Login (Passwordless OTP)
features.description: Authenticate using email-based OTP to access the app without a password.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Enter email -> Request OTP -> Enter OTP code -> Submit login -> See activity dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Enter email -> Request OTP -> Enter invalid OTP code -> Submit login -> See error message on invalid credentials

features.name: Activity Log
features.description: Browse recent activity related to books and users; navigate from activities to user profiles.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View list of activities -> Select a user's name in an activity -> Navigate to /profile -> See the user's profile

features.name: User Profile
features.description: View a user's profile page containing their public details and activity context.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Select a user's name in an activity -> Navigate to /profile -> See that user's profile details

features.name: Book Requests
features.description: Manage incoming and outgoing book exchange requests by reviewing and responding to them.
user_flows: Navigate to /requests -> View requests list -> Accept a request -> See the request marked as accepted
Navigate to /requests -> View requests list -> Decline a request -> See the request marked as declined

features.name: Chat Interface
features.description: Send and receive messages with other users through an in-app chat conversation view.
user_flows: Navigate to /chat -> View chat history -> Type a message -> Send message -> See message appended to chat history

features.name: Progressive Web App (PWA) Install
features.description: Install the web app to a device and retain session state across visits for an app-like experience.
user_flows: Open the web app in a PWA-capable browser -> Install the app to the device -> Launch the installed app -> See the app load and remain signed in across visits

features.name: User Login
features.description: Passwordless login with email and OTP code
user_interactions: See error message on invalid credentials

features.name: Activity Log
features.description: View recent activities and navigate to user profiles
user_interactions: Click on a user's name to view their profile (requires auth)

features.name: Book Requests
features.description: Manage incoming and outgoing library book requests
